title: Signal Signature
description: Schema for a formation's signal type signature — the Greek-letter variable encoding of its input/output signal classes. Used by signal algebra to determine composability: two formations f and g are composable iff output(g) ∩ input(f) ≠ ∅.

formation_name.description: Name of the formation this signature describes

inputs.description: Greek-letter variables for signal classes this formation consumes

outputs.description: Greek-letter variables for signal classes this formation produces

primary.description: Primary named function this formation participates in (e.g., theoria, poiesis)

secondary.description: Additional named functions this formation participates in
